faqs.question: How much does bed bug treatment cost in Glendale, Queens?
faqs.answer: Bed bug treatment in Glendale typically ranges from $1,200 to $3,500 depending on the size of your home, severity of the infestation, and treatment method selected. We offer free inspections and provide detailed, upfront pricing with no hidden fees before beginning any treatment.

faqs.question: What bed bug treatment methods do you use in Glendale?
faqs.answer: We offer both heat treatment and targeted chemical applications for Glendale properties. Heat treatment raises room temperatures to levels that kill bed bugs and their eggs instantly, while our EPA-approved chemical treatments provide residual protection. Our technicians will recommend the best method based on your specific situation and property type.

faqs.question: How long does bed bug treatment take in a Glendale apartment?
faqs.answer: Most bed bug treatments in Glendale apartments take 4-8 hours depending on the size and infestation level. Heat treatments are typically completed in one day, while chemical treatments may require a follow-up visit 10-14 days later to ensure complete elimination of any newly hatched bed bugs.

faqs.question: Do I need to leave my Glendale home during bed bug treatment?
faqs.answer: For heat treatments, you'll need to vacate for 6-8 hours while we raise temperatures to effective levels. Chemical treatments require you to leave for 4-6 hours until surfaces dry completely. We provide detailed preparation instructions before treatment and will advise you on exactly when it's safe to return to your Glendale home.
